transcript.text: Greetings Living in Boulder V-Log, October 12th, 2019, Saturday, 5.32pm.
I didn't do a V-Log yesterday because I got too stressed out about my religious statistics page.
It just kept going on and on and on.
I actually did do a video. It was 15 minutes long, but I didn't like the sound of it. I was just a bit of a mum and stuff.
So I was like, fuck it, no, upload it. Maybe I should have uploaded it.
But anyway, so I was working until like 8 in the morning and my mum called me at 4.30 in the morning yelling at me, telling me I needed to get to sleep.
Because she wanted me to come over at 1, so I called at like 1 and asked her if she still wanted me to come over.
She said no, so I got up at like, yeah, I got up at like, I slept from like 8 until like 3 or whatever, 2 or 3, I can't remember.
And then I was working, trying to fix the everlasting religious statistics page that I made just every single mistake imaginable on.
So whatever, I don't even want to talk about it.
At least I have it ingrained in my head, like muscle memory of the brain.
You know, what I definitely need to make sure to look out for next time I do a page like that.
And actually, you know, I'm building a page kind of from scratch, intricate one.
The one I was doing before, the fighter level one.
There'll be lots of links in that one, so.
I just finished not so long ago, got high, and then remembered I didn't do the video.
I want to do the video now.
So I think the next video, I mean, page I'm going to work on is, because, yeah, I just, as soon as I was done with that religious statistics, I just X'd out of that sucker.
I didn't even look at it.
I just fixed that final link and then was like, okay, that's it.
I don't want to look at it anymore.
I'll look at it later when my brain's fresh on it.

So the next one I want to do for a week is, because I'm kind of dancing around.
I'm doing this random ass page, this random page.
I have so many of them that are so basic that if I threw a week in on any one of these, then I could just quantum leap.
For example, the religious statistics.
It took a lot longer than I thought, but I knocked that and my lists page off in a week.
So, yeah, I'm going to throw a week.
This next one I'm going to do is my direct ancestors page for myself.
I think a year ago or whatever.
I don't even really remember when, but I had this push, and I don't even remember how long it was.
But I just, you know, went down the rabbit hole of my ancestors, and I think I dug up every single one and dumped them onto that page.
And I have one list that's complete, and that's the pure matrilineal.
So then I'm going to figure out a way to have every single list on there and have it linkable and easily easy to understand, but have everything on there.
And, yeah, so that's what I'll do now.
That's what I'm going to do for a week.
And, you know, if I can finish in a week, great.
If I can't, at least I can get really far in a week.
Another one I'd like to do is videos, YouTube videos for myself.
You know, if I give a whole week of that and I get really far along, I could create a whole list of videos that I want to do, which would be really cool.
I want to fix my English teaching page.
I don't know how much work that needs.
That's, like, the oldest part of my whole website.
And, you know what?
I think I'll go into the bike racer levels for a week because I don't think – I don't know if I've even worked on that really at all.
I was working on it for, like, a day a few months back, but to put a week into that would be amazing because I don't think I'd worked on it since I got the Mac.
And those other computers, you know, are so slow, I could probably do – be like, oh, wow, look how basic this is.
Look how much I can bring it up.
So that's probably what I will do.
I'll do – I'll do personal ancestry for one week.
And I'm starting kind of on the weekends, so I'll do all this day all the way up until next Sunday.
And then after next Sunday, I'm done, whether I'm done or not.
And then after that, it's bike racer levels for a week, which I definitely will not get done in a week.
